# 🚀 NEONPRO INTELLIGENT ORCHESTRATOR - Healthcare Excellence & Constitutional AI Development

**Philosophy**: "Healthcare-first engineering + Constitutional AI + Intelligent context loading + Aesthetic clinic excellence"
**Approach**: Smart healthcare trigger detection → Dynamic context assembly → Constitutional compliance → Quality enforcement
**Performance**: <200ms context assembly + <5s compliance validation + ≥95% healthcare accuracy
**Intelligence**: Healthcare Constitutional AI + BMad integration + MCP orchestration + Anti-drift protocols

## 🧠 HEALTHCARE INTELLIGENCE ORCHESTRATION ENGINE

### **⚡ Healthcare Domain Detection & Context Loading**
```yaml
NEONPRO_ORCHESTRATION_SYSTEM:
  innovation: "Healthcare-specific context engineering + Constitutional AI + Dynamic BMad integration + Zero-redundancy MCP coordination"
  approach: "Parse request → Detect healthcare domain + compliance → Auto-load specialists → Execute with constitutional validation"
  quality_assurance: "≥9.9/10 for healthcare systems + Constitutional compliance + BMad story validation"

HEALTHCARE_DOMAIN_DETECTION_MATRIX:
  clinic_operations:
    triggers: ["appointment", "scheduling", "patient", "treatment", "consultation", "aesthetic", "beauty", "clinic workflow"]
    auto_load: "Healthcare operations specialist + Patient management context + Scheduling intelligence"
    mcp_research: "context7 → Healthcare standards + tavily → Aesthetic clinic best practices + constitutional compliance"
    timing: "BEFORE any clinic operation implementation"
    quality_threshold: "≥9.9/10 (Healthcare-grade)"
    
  compliance_regulatory:
    triggers: ["lgpd", "anvisa", "cfm", "gdpr", "compliance", "audit", "privacy", "consent", "medical records"]
    auto_load: "Compliance specialist + Regulatory framework + Constitutional validation"
    mcp_research: "tavily → Latest Brazilian healthcare regulations + context7 → LGPD implementation + constitutional analysis"
    timing: "IMMEDIATE - Before any data handling"
    quality_threshold: "≥9.9/10 (Regulatory compliance)"
    
  patient_management:
    triggers: ["patient data", "medical history", "treatment plan", "consultation notes", "aesthetic procedures"]
    auto_load: "Patient care specialist + Medical data handler + Privacy protection"
    mcp_research: "context7 → Medical data standards + exa → Patient management patterns + constitutional healthcare ethics"
    timing: "BEFORE patient data operations"
    quality_threshold: "≥9.9/10 (Medical data security)"
    
  ai_driven_efficiency:
    triggers: ["intelligent scheduling", "predictive analytics", "ai recommendations", "wellness intelligence", "treatment prediction"]
    auto_load: "AI healthcare specialist + Predictive analytics + Constitutional AI ethics"
    mcp_research: "sequential-thinking → AI healthcare ethics + exa → Medical AI patterns + constitutional validation"
    timing: "BEFORE AI feature implementation"
    quality_threshold: "≥9.9/10 (AI healthcare standards)"
    
  financial_healthcare:
    triggers: ["treatment pricing", "insurance", "healthcare billing", "financial reporting", "clinic revenue"]
    auto_load: "Healthcare finance specialist + Billing systems + Compliance validation"
    mcp_research: "context7 → Healthcare billing standards + tavily → Brazilian healthcare finance + constitutional compliance"
    timing: "BEFORE financial system implementation"
    quality_threshold: "≥9.8/10 (Financial healthcare compliance)"
    
  technical_development:
    triggers: ["nextjs", "supabase", "react", "typescript", "database", "api", "architecture", "performance"]
    auto_load: "Healthcare tech specialist + Constitutional development + BMad integration"
    mcp_research: "context7 → Framework documentation + tavily → Healthcare tech patterns + constitutional validation"
    timing: "BEFORE technical implementation"
    quality_threshold: "≥9.7/10 (Healthcare tech standards)"
```

NEONPRO_SYSTEM_FOUNDATION:

## 🚀 STRATEGIC MCP INTEGRATION & HEALTHCARE RESEARCH-FIRST

### **Healthcare Research-First Protocol**
```yaml
HEALTHCARE_RESEARCH_MANDATE:
  constitutional_principle: "ALWAYS research healthcare standards + Constitutional validation before implementation"
  
  phase_1_healthcare_documentation:
    tool: "context7"
    trigger: "ANY healthcare/medical implementation + Constitutional requirement validation"
    process: "Medical standards → Brazilian healthcare regulations → Constitutional compliance → Framework patterns"
    target_time: "<5s"
    
  phase_2_compliance_validation:
    tool: "tavily"
    trigger: "LGPD/ANVISA/CFM compliance + Patient data + Constitutional validation"
    process: "Real-time regulatory updates → Current compliance requirements → Constitutional healthcare analysis"
    target_time: "<3s"
    
  phase_3_healthcare_intelligence:
    tool: "exa"
    trigger: "Complex healthcare implementations + AI medical systems + Constitutional healthcare ethics"
    process: "Advanced medical patterns → Healthcare AI ethics → Constitutional analysis + Regulatory examples"
    target_time: "<7s"
    
  phase_4_constitutional_healthcare_reasoning:
    tool: "sequential-thinking"
    trigger: "Healthcare complexity ≥L5 OR medical ethics decisions OR Constitutional validation required"
    process: "Constitutional healthcare analysis → Medical ethics validation → Regulatory compliance → Quality verification"
    target_time: "<10s"
    
  phase_5_healthcare_system_operations:
    tool: "desktop-commander + supabase-mcp"
    trigger: "Patient data operations + Medical record management + Constitutional compliance"
    process: "Constitutional healthcare data handling → LGPD compliance → Patient privacy protection"
    target_time: "<2s"

HEALTHCARE_MCP_COORDINATION:
  parallel_healthcare_execution: "Run healthcare-compatible MCPs (context7 + tavily) with constitutional validation"
  medical_research_synthesis: "Constitutional AI synthesis of medical findings → Validate healthcare ethics → Apply insights"
  healthcare_result_caching: "Cache healthcare research results (5-minute sessions) → Avoid redundant medical lookups"
  constitutional_quality_gate: "Validate healthcare research quality ≥9.9/10 before implementation"
```

## 🏗️ NEONPRO ARCHITECTURE & HEALTHCARE PATTERNS

### **Healthcare Database & Security (Constitutional)**
```yaml
NEONPRO_DATABASE_ARCHITECTURE:
  supabase_integration:
    project_id: "ownkoxryswokcdanrdgj"
    region: "sa-east-1 (São Paulo, Brasil - LGPD compliance)"
    tables: "40+ healthcare-specific tables with constitutional data patterns"
    rls_policies: "Multi-tenant Row Level Security for patient data isolation"
    
  constitutional_security_patterns:
    patient_data_encryption: "Field-level encryption for sensitive medical data"
    audit_logging: "Comprehensive audit trails for all patient data access"
    consent_management: "Granular consent tracking with constitutional validation"
    data_subject_rights: "LGPD rights automation with constitutional compliance"
    
  mandatory_mcp_usage:
    database_operations: "mcp_supabase-mcp_execute_sql (constitutional validation required)"
    schema_changes: "mcp_supabase-mcp_apply_migration (healthcare compliance validation)"
    table_verification: "mcp_supabase-mcp_list_tables (constitutional structure validation)"
    constitutional_requirement: "ALL database operations through MCP with healthcare validation"

HEALTHCARE_AUTH_PATTERNS:
  session_management:
    pattern: "Constitutional healthcare session with role-based access"
    implementation: |
      ```tsx
      const supabase = await createClient();
      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
      if (!session) redirect("/login");
      
      // Constitutional healthcare role validation
      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
      const userRole = await validateHealthcareRole(user.id);
      const constitutionalAccess = await validateConstitutionalAccess(userRole, requestedResource);
      
      if (!constitutionalAccess) throw new Error("Constitutional healthcare access violation");
      ```
    constitutional_requirement: "All healthcare access validated against constitutional principles"
```

### **Healthcare UI Component System (Constitutional)**
```yaml
NEONPRO_HEALTHCARE_UI:
  design_system:
    foundation: "shadcn/ui with healthcare constitutional enhancements"
    accessibility: "WCAG 2.1 AA + Healthcare accessibility (constitutional requirement)"
    patient_experience: "Anxiety-reducing design patterns (constitutional care principle)"
    
  healthcare_component_categories:
    patient_forms:
      constitutional_principle: "Minimize patient data collection, maximize privacy protection"
      patterns: "Progressive disclosure + Constitutional consent + LGPD compliance"
      quality_standard: "≥9.9/10 patient privacy + Constitutional validation"
      
    treatment_interfaces:
      constitutional_principle: "Clear, transparent treatment information + Constitutional healthcare ethics"
      patterns: "Treatment transparency + Progress tracking + Constitutional care validation"
      quality_standard: "≥9.8/10 patient understanding + Constitutional clarity"
      
    clinic_dashboards:
      constitutional_principle: "Efficient clinic operations + Constitutional efficiency + Patient privacy"
      patterns: "AI-driven insights + Constitutional efficiency + Privacy-preserving analytics"
      quality_standard: "≥9.7/10 operational efficiency + Constitutional privacy"

CONSTITUTIONAL_LAYOUT_PATTERNS:
  dashboard_layout:
    pattern: "Constitutional healthcare dashboard with role-based access"
    implementation: |
      ```tsx
      const healthcareBreadcrumbs = [
        { title: "Clínica", href: "/dashboard" },
        { title: pageName, constitutional_access: validateConstitutionalAccess(userRole, pageName) }
      ];
      
      return (
        <HealthcareDashboardLayout 
          user={user} 
          breadcrumbs={healthcareBreadcrumbs}
          constitutionalValidation={true}
        >
          {constitutionallyValidatedContent}
        </HealthcareDashboardLayout>
      );
      ```
    constitutional_requirement: "All healthcare interfaces validated for constitutional compliance"
```
